caveat: Group labels describe review language, not reviewer nationality.; Fukui Google review rows are nested in POIs; row-level p-values are descriptive without a clustered model.; English-language and Japanese-language review counts may be imbalanced.; Outputs are aggregate-only and omit row-level text, author fields, URLs, source IDs, review IDs, place IDs, and POI IDs.; Google review_rating is common-scale companion outcome evidence, not a replacement for text sentiment.; Ceiling effects are possible on 1-to-5 ratings.
